title: No privileged containers
description: Containers must not use privileged mode or host namespace

title: Resource limits required
description: Every container must define CPU and memory limits

title: Read-only root filesystem
description: Containers must mount root filesystem as read-only

title: NetworkPolicy enforced
description: Namespaces must have a default-deny NetworkPolicy

title: Liveness probe present
description: Every pod must define a livenessProbe

title: Image from trusted registry
description: Images must come from internal registry only

title: No hostPath volumes
description: Pods must not use hostPath volumes
